items.raw_desc: Hibakód olvasó ANCEL FD500 OBD Ford:The NCEL FD500 is a high-end automotive diagnostic scanner designed specifically for Ford vehicles, which includes the Ford, Lincoln and Mercury brands. This versatile tool finds a wide range of applications both in the home garages of enthusiastic mechanics and in professional garages. The main advantage is the ability to diagnose and help repair a wide range of faults in key vehicle systems. The FD500 scanner can read and delete error codes not only from the engine control unit, but also from other control units, that control systems like ABS, airbags, transmission, air conditioning and much more. It offers support for all 10 OBD-II modes and provides in-depth analysis of error codes, live data and emission readiness. Thanks to the improved STM processor and colour TFT display, operation is fast, clear and intuitive even for less experienced users. items.raw_desc: Hibakód olvasó ANCEL VD700 OBD-II - VAG:ANCEL VD700 is an advanced diagnostic code reader designed specifically for Volkswagen vehicles, including VW, Audi, Skoda and Seat. It offers comprehensive diagnostics of all major vehicle systems and helps with routine maintenance. The diagnostic device is an improved version of the previous ANCEL VD500 and brings even more options to VAG owners. Thanks to its versatile features, the VD700 enables in-depth diagnostics of systems such as ABS, SAS, SRS, ESP, TPMS, transmission, motor, immobiliser and batteries. It can effectively detect vehicle problems and prevent potential faults, helping to keep the car in perfect condition. This makes it easy for VAG owners to diagnose any problems without having to visit an authorised workshop. In addition to diagnostics, the VD700 also offers a range of service functions for routine maintenance. These include throttle adaptation, resetting the brake pads, Resetting TPMS tyre pressure sensors, steering angle calibration, Reset the oil service interval, injector coding...

Csillár Eglo GAETANO 1:
	

	
	
	
	Závěsné svítidlo EGLO GAETANO 1 je moderní lustr určený do interiéru. Jeho kovové provedení se hodí do ložnice nebo obývacího pokoje.
